name: Paralytic Haze
statusOutcome: Ushris giggles as she takes a few steps back and her eyeless snake tail rises up with a hiss, darting out in front of her to spew out a virulent green haze that instantly engulfs you, leaving your body numbing, tingling, and increasingly unresponsive.
statusMiss: Ushris giggles as she takes a few steps back and her eyeless snake tail rises up with a hiss, darting out in front of her to spew out a virulent green haze, but you manage to slip out of it before it can take ahold of you.
